testcase.name: speak
testcase.failure: org.junit.ComparisonFailure: expected:<He[llo]!> but was:<He[re I am]!> at org.junit.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:117) at org.junit.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:146) at com.example.app.SpeakerTest.speak(SpeakerTest.java:11) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:104) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:565) at org.apache.maven.surefire.booter.ForkedBooter.main(ForkedBooter.java:495)
